question: My CBC shows a hemoglobin of 9.5 and MCV of 72. My doctor says I have anemia. What kind is this likely to be and what is the next step?
I have been told I have DVT in my leg. My doctor started me on blood thinners. How long do I need to take them?
I have a bleeding disorder called von Willebrand disease. I need surgery — how does this affect my perioperative management?
My platelet count came back at 60,000. What are the common causes of a low platelet count and when is it dangerous?
I was diagnosed with chronic lymphocytic leukemia. My hematologist says we should just watch and wait. Is that really the right approach?
I've had two blood clots in the past two years with no obvious cause. My hematologist is testing me for a clotting disorder. What might they find?
I was recently diagnosed with multiple myeloma. What is this disease and what does modern treatment look like?
I have sickle cell anemia and I'm having a pain crisis. What are the triggers I should avoid and how are crises managed?
I've been diagnosed with myelodysplastic syndrome. How serious is this and what is the risk of it turning into leukemia?
My doctor found enlarged lymph nodes throughout my body and my LDH is elevated. What does this suggest and what workup is needed?
I have hemophilia A. My child was just diagnosed. How is it managed in children and how do we prevent joint damage?
I had a pulmonary embolism and my doctor wants me on anticoagulation indefinitely. Why might this be permanent and what are the risks of lifelong blood thinners?
My husband was diagnosed with diffuse large B-cell lymphoma. The oncologist recommends R-CHOP chemotherapy. What does this treatment involve?
I have a JAK2 mutation and elevated red blood cells. My doctor diagnosed polycythemia vera. What are the long-term risks and treatments?
I have iron deficiency anemia that keeps coming back even after iron supplements. What does recurrent iron deficiency suggest?
I was just diagnosed with acute myeloid leukemia. My doctor says I need immediate treatment. What should I expect in the coming weeks?
My daughter has thalassemia trait. Is this the same as having thalassemia disease and what does it mean for her future pregnancies?
I need a blood transfusion for surgery. What are the risks and when is a transfusion really necessary versus avoidable?
I have antiphospholipid syndrome. My rheumatologist and hematologist have slightly different opinions on my anticoagulation. Who should I follow?
I'm on warfarin and my INR has been unstable. My doctor suggested switching to a direct oral anticoagulant. What are the advantages?
I was told I have essential thrombocythemia with a platelet count of 900,000. Do I need treatment and what are the clot risks?
My WBC is elevated at 25,000 but I don't have an infection. My doctor ordered a peripheral smear. What diagnoses are they looking for?
I was in remission from Hodgkin lymphoma for two years and now my PET scan shows recurrence. What treatment options are available?
I have chronic ITP and my platelet counts are very low. My hematologist mentioned splenectomy. Is removing my spleen a permanent cure?
I need a bone marrow biopsy. What does the procedure involve and how painful is it?
My oncologist mentioned CAR-T cell therapy for my lymphoma. How does this treatment work and what are the major side effects?
I have myelofibrosis. What are the JAK inhibitors used to treat this and what is the role of stem cell transplant?
I was treated for cancer with heavy chemotherapy and now my CBC shows all counts very low. What is aplastic anemia and how is it different from my cancer?
My hemolysis labs show elevated LDH and bilirubin with low haptoglobin. What does this pattern mean?
I have CML and was just started on imatinib. My oncologist said I may not need chemotherapy. Is a targeted oral pill really as effective as chemotherapy for leukemia?
